## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `make lint` (or `uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check . && uv run mypy app`) and it passes
- [ ] I ran the relevant test suite (`make test` / `npm run test` / `npm run typecheck`) and it passes
- [ ] I updated documentation (`README.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, or `docs/`) if behavior or commands changed
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, `.env`, or `secrets/master_key`
- [ ] For crypto/auth/admin changes: I read [docs/THREAT_MODEL.md](../docs/THREAT_MODEL.md) / [docs/SECURITY.md](../docs/SECURITY.md) and this change doesn't weaken an existing control
